title: Flame Grilled Slovakian Rye Bread Toast
description: Indulge in the smoky flavor of flame grilled Slovakian rye bread toast, a delicious and umami rich dish perfect for a snack or light meal, made with jain friendly ingredients.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium high heat.
Brush both sides of the rye bread slices with olive oil.
In a small bowl, mix together smoked paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Sprinkle the paprika mixture evenly over the bread slices.
Grill the bread slices for 2-3 minutes per side, or until they are toasted and slightly charred.
Remove the bread from the grill and let it cool for a minute or two.
If desired, spread a layer of vegan mayo on each bread slice.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley, if desired.
Serve the flame grilled Slovakian rye bread toast immediately and enjoy.
